title: Preflop Range Visualization (Hand Matrix por Posição)
plan: Create hand categorization utility function (_categorize_hand) that converts hero_cards like 'Ah Kd' to standard notation like 'AKo', 'AKs', 'AA'

Implement get_hand_matrix() method in CashAnalyzer (src/analyzers/cash.py) that groups hands by category and position, calculates frequency (played/received), win rate (net BB/100), and action breakdown (open raise, call, 3-bet)
Implement _render_hand_matrix_svg() in cash_report.py generating inline 13x13 SVG grid with color-coded cells by frequency and action type (blue=open raise, yellow=call, red=3-bet)

Implement _render_range_analysis() HTML section with position filter tabs (UTG, MP, CO, BTN, SB, BB), SVG matrix per position, optional ideal range overlay, top 10 most profitable and top 10 most deficient hands tables
Integrate range analysis section into generate_cash_report() pipeline
Create comprehensive test suite (tests/test_hand_matrix.py) covering hand categorization, frequency calculation, action breakdown, win rate aggregation, and position filtering
Run quality gates (pytest, lint, typecheck, build verification)
